Why Work With Me為何選擇我

A Different Kind of Financial Adviser與眾不同的財務顧問

◈

Real-World Experience實戰經驗

Over a decade across UK financial institutions — practical understanding of how planning works in reality, not just theory.十年以上在英國各規模金融機構的實戰經歷，深刻理解財務規劃在現實中的運作方式。

⬡

Oxford Political Economy牛津政治經濟學

A unique lens that helps you plan not just for growth, but for long-term resilience against economic and political forces.牛津政治經濟學的視角，協助您不僅規劃增長，更建立長遠的抗禦力。

◇

Tailored, Not Generic量身訂製

Every client receives a structured, personalised approach — so every decision is made with clarity and conviction, not uncertainty.每位客戶均獲得結構化、個人化的服務，讓每個決策都建立在清晰與信念之上。
